testsuite.name: com.orangehrm.seleniumuiframework.pimtest.RequirementTest

testcase.name: afterclass

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.linkText: Logout' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.linkText: Logout' (tried for 10
